content.en:
Now.

Ye Tian already had a deep understanding of the Forbidden Dao, and he was almost able to fully comprehend it with one foot in the door.

Of course, what he comprehended was not a complete forbidden dao, it was too difficult, let alone him, I am afraid that Ouyang Jiu'er might not have comprehended a complete forbidden dao.

If it were to be described in proportion, he would probably be about to comprehend one in ten thousand forbidden paths, which is already a remarkable achievement.

Another period of time has passed, and Ye Tian is still comprehending the forbidden way.

With the assistance of the Forbidden Mother Stone and the Forbidden Stone Tablet fragments, on this day, Ye Tian finally understood a forbidden path, and the whole person seemed to have completed a huge baptism, and a fundamental qualitative change occurred.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Great Dao Origin was also integrated into the Forbidden Dao, and a trace of change began to occur, and even a trace of the Forbidden Dao Origin was born, which made his own Great Dao Origin begin to change, but this change was a good change, a kind of transformation towards a higher level of Origin.

At this time, Ye Tiancai realized the power of the Forbidden Dao, and the Great Dao of a realm could not be compared to the Forbidden Dao at all, and the two were completely two levels of power.

It can also be said that the Dao of the Realm is an evolution of the Forbidden Dao and belongs to the weakened version.

"I have comprehended the Forbidden Dao, although it is only a Forbidden Dao, and it is still far from the complete Forbidden Dao, but it is also of some help to my strength, with the power of the Dark Forbidden Dao that I currently master, it is enough to exert a full blow comparable to the Thousand Dao Techniques in Dacheng, the key is that it can continue to attack, but the Dao Technique cannot do continuous attacks!" Ye Tian muttered.

The point is that he has comprehended a forbidden path, which can be regarded as opening the door to the forbidden path, which is extremely important!

The reason why many people have not comprehended the forbidden path all the time, and even become the strongest Dao Ancestor and the invincible Dao Ancestor has not comprehended the forbidden Dao, is because they have not opened this door.

If the door of the forbidden path is opened, it will take a long time, and you will be able to make achievements in the forbidden path.

If those Dao Ancestors knew that Ye Tianshen had realized the Forbidden Dao, they would probably be extremely jealous.

But Ye Tian didn't have any pride and pride, he knew very well that there was a big gap between himself and Ouyang Jiu'er in the Forbidden Dao, Ouyang Jiu'er was the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, and he had a high attainment in the Forbidden Dao in his previous life, and now even if he was reincarnated and re-cultivated, he had now mastered the Forbidden Dao, and he was making rapid progress.

Ye Tian didn't know how deep Ouyang Jiu'er's attainments were in the Forbidden Dao, but he was definitely far beyond him.

He even suspected that Ouyang Jiu'er's current combat strength had surpassed him.

Of course, this is just a temporary transcendence, after all, Ouyang Jiu'er has the foundation of his previous life, and he naturally made rapid progress at the beginning stage, so he didn't have to compete with Ouyang Jiu'er for the speed of progress.

The forbidden path that Ye Tian comprehended was the way of attacking, focusing on attack, and it could bless the power of attack.

Therefore, the forbidden path that he followed to comprehend was mainly related to attack, and after comprehending the first forbidden path, it was much easier to comprehend the other forbidden paths.

In the following days, Ye Tianhua continued to comprehend the forbidden path most of the time, and one taboo path after another was realized by Ye Tianshen.

Of course, he is only preliminary, and his attainments are not high.

But now, Ye Tian is only pursuing quantity, not quality, only seeking to comprehend more taboo paths.

In addition, Ye Tian was also working hard to cultivate forbidden arts, constantly improving his physical strength, true ancestor power, and soul power, striving for an all-round improvement.

In addition to Ye Tian, Xiao Yue has also made great progress with a pair of children.

The main thing is that Ye Tian gave some of the Forbidden Dao Stones to Xiao Yue and a pair of children, so that they could use the Forbidden Dao Stone to refine the power of the True Ancestor and refine the Forbidden Body, without caring about the Forbidden Dao Stone, Xiao Yue quickly stepped into the realm of the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

And Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue have also made rapid progress, and now they are already the top True Ancestor combat power, and it is estimated that it will not be long before they can step into the Supreme True Ancestor combat power.

this day.

In the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, a forbidden treasure land appeared in the King Kong True Kingdom.

However, this time, the major forces did not fight for this forbidden treasure land, but sent people to block it.

Soon after, the Tianhai Sect sent people to ask Ye Tian to participate in the sect meeting, and all representatives of the various sects or invincible true ancestors were qualified to attend this meeting.

And Ye Tian, as the supreme true ancestor, was naturally invited to the ranks.

And the content of this meeting is that forbidden treasure land!

It can be said that this time is very harmonious, unlike before, as soon as the forbidden treasure comes out, fights are everywhere.

King Kong True Kingdom, Ye Tian came here, this is the territory of King Kong City.

The Vajra True Kingdom is a huge True Kingdom that has been retransformed into a Vajra City after occupying several True Kingdoms, with countless living beings inside, constantly sending geniuses to Vajra City and strengthening the power of Vajra City.

The meeting was set at the Vajra City branch of the Vajra True Kingdom, if it was set at the headquarters of Vajra City, no one would dare to go, after all, it was the base camp of Vajra City, there were a large number of True Ancestors sitting there, and the Dao Ancestors were easy to come and be born.

If King Kong City attacked them, they would not have the slightest chance to escape.

If it's in the Vajra City branch, it's not very dangerous.

Soon after.

Ye Tian came to King Kong City alone, and was treated with the highest courtesy, and a female disciple of King Kong City at the top True Ancestor level personally acted as a guide and took Ye Tian into the residence of the King Kong City Branch, and explained the general situation of this meeting.

Ye Tian came relatively early, so he stayed in King Kong City, and a few days later, the other True Ancestors arrived one by one.

The meeting has finally begun!

In the conference hall, Ye Tian sat in a high position, sitting with those invincible true ancestors, while the true ancestors who were weak or from small forces could only sit on the edge.

The meeting was initiated by the Tianhai Sect, but the forbidden treasure appeared in the Vajra True Kingdom, so it was scheduled to open here, so it can be regarded as the Tianhai Sect and Vajra City jointly organized this meeting.

The one who really presided over the meeting was the invincible true ancestor of the Tianhai Sect - Hebo True Ancestor!

Hebo True Ancestor spoke: "Everyone, everyone must be very eager to enter that forbidden treasure land, but the upper triple heaven forces and a small number of middle triple heaven forces all know about the situation of that forbidden treasure land, so they are not in a hurry to break into the forbidden treasure land. But I guess there are still many people who don't know, so I'll just talk about it. That forbidden treasure land was very special, the invincible True Ancestors of King Kong City tried to enter there, but found that they couldn't get in, but some True Ancestors managed to get in!"

Hearing this, many True Ancestors were curious.

Ye Tian was not surprised, he was very well-informed, so he naturally knew about it for a long time, but he did not interrupt Hebo Zhenzu, but listened carefully.

I saw that Hebo True Ancestor said again: "According to our continuous research, we finally found that the person who can enter that forbidden treasure land must be under the age of ten million, of course, this age does not include the time within the time acceleration, but according to the date of birth, the age recognized by the Xuanxu Ancient Realm! Therefore, our ancient true ancestors cannot enter at all, he is giving benefits to those new true ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm! According to the reports of some true ancestors who have entered it, this forbidden treasure land is also very dangerous, but the opportunity is not small, and there are some forbidden and strange things. But the most precious place is that there is a natal talent tree inside the forbidden treasure land, which has 1,024 fruits on it, and each fruit can give birth to a Dao-level natal talent!"

"What, the Natal Talent Tree, the Forbidden Treasure Land actually gave birth to such a legendary ancient tree!"

Many True Ancestors were shocked.

In fact, when Ye Tiangang learned the news, he was also very shocked.

The Natal Talent Tree is even rarer and more precious than the Talent Ancestral Pool, and once it appears, it is enough to cause countless Dao Ancestors to fight and snatch it.

But this time it was different, the Natal Talent Tree appeared in the Forbidden Treasure Land, and it was a very restrictive Forbidden Treasure Land, and the Dao Ancestors could not enter this Forbidden Treasure Land, so they could only covet it but could not take the Natal Talent Tree.

At this time, Hebo True Ancestor said again: "According to the situation we have learned, there are a large number of forbidden bloodline creatures around the Natal Talent Tree, many of which are comparable to the top True Ancestors and the strongest True Ancestors, and the first batch of True Ancestors who entered it, only a few people came back, and they were all hit hard, and all the others fell into the hands of the forbidden bloodline creatures. Therefore, we must send a large number of True Ancestors who are under the age of 10 million. There are countless opportunities in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but there are too few True Ancestors under the age of 10 million, and it is difficult for any one force to send out many! However, if the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm is calculated, there are too many such True Ancestors! And according to our calculations, the rules of this forbidden treasure land are very peculiar, and many people from the outside world are not allowed to enter, so we are ready to select the strongest 100,000 true ancestors to enter this forbidden treasure land and snatch the natal talent fruit!"
